title: desmodium lasiocarpum
intro: Desmodium lasiocarpum, also known as showy tick clover, is a perennial legume native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Desmodium lasiocarpum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Desmodium lasiocarpum include infusions, teas, and topical creams, which can be made by drying and crushing the leaves and flowers of the plant.
